prompt_text:
### Demographics: 46-year-old Asian woman

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 7 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after preoperative labs showed elevated HbA1c
Current symptoms: No DKA/HHS symptoms; no recent hypoglycemia episodes; no acute complaints

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 5 (0-15) (Dialysis: Peritoneal dialysis)
Fibrosis
Body mass index category: Obese Class I
Major Depressive Disorder
Appendicitis (status post appendectomy)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 5 (0-15) (Dialysis: Peritoneal dialysis); HF (No); ASCVD (No); MASLD: Fibrosis; BMI Category: Obese Class I
- Family history: No family history of type 2 diabetes (elicited)
- Social history: Current smoker (5 cigarettes/day for 15 years; ~3.8 pack-years); Alcohol 1-2 drinks/month

### Medication information
- Current medications: Sitagliptin 100mg once daily; Insulin Degludec 15units once daily; Sertraline (50 mg daily), Lisinopril (10 mg daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 69.6 kg; Height 163.9 cm; BMI 25.9 kg/m²; Blood pressure 113/60 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 10.7%; 9 months ago 11.0%; 6 months ago 11.0%; 3 months ago 11.0%; current 10.4%), FPG (12 months ago 241mg/dL; 9 months ago 320mg/dL; 6 months ago 242mg/dL; 3 months ago 320mg/dL; current 232mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 70.3kg; 9 months ago 68.7kg; 6 months ago 68.9kg; 3 months ago 70.8kg; current 69.6kg), Height (12 months ago 163.9cm; 9 months ago 163.9cm; 6 months ago 163.9cm; 3 months ago 163.9cm; current 163.9cm), BMI (12 months ago 26.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 26.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 26.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 26.0kg/m²; current 25.9kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 120mmHg; 9 months ago 120mmHg; 6 months ago 120mmHg; 3 months ago 120mmHg; current 113mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 60mmHg; 9 months ago 60mmHg; 6 months ago 60mmHg; 3 months ago 61mmHg; current 60mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 78U/L; 9 months ago 76U/L; 6 months ago 76U/L; 3 months ago 68U/L; current 76U/L), AST (12 months ago 66U/L; 9 months ago 71U/L; 6 months ago 66U/L; 3 months ago 73U/L; current 73U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 1.6mg/dL; 9 months ago 1.6mg/dL; 6 months ago 1.6mg/dL; 3 months ago 1.6mg/dL; current 1.6mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 19mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 18mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 14mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 15mL/min/1.73m²; current 12mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 243mg/g; 9 months ago 259mg/g; 6 months ago 296mg/g; 3 months ago 226mg/g; current 306mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 69mg/dL; 9 months ago 70mg/dL; 6 months ago 69mg/dL; 3 months ago 70mg/dL; current 72mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 55mg/dL; 9 months ago 51mg/dL; 6 months ago 55mg/dL; 3 months ago 54mg/dL; current 53mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 137mg/dL; 9 months ago 141mg/dL; 6 months ago 138mg/dL; 3 months ago 136mg/dL; current 148mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 12.0g/dL; 9 months ago 11.2g/dL; 6 months ago 11.0g/dL; 3 months ago 11.0g/dL; current 10.5g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Very poor adherence (estimated <50%); SMBG rarely performed; lifestyle control severely limited.
Financial context: Patient has standard insurance with moderate copays and a monthly medication budget of ≤ KRW 500,000.
